description: Call GET /api/v1/google/hotels/search for Google SERP Hotels Search through Just Serp API with check_in_date, check_out_date, and query.

operations.description: Get Google hotels Search data, including prices, ratings, and availability details, for travel comparison and hospitality market analysis.

parameters.description: The destination or specific hotel name you are searching for (e.g., 'Paris', 'Hilton New York').
parameters.name: query

parameters.description: The hotel check-in date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format (e.g., '2026-05-20').
parameters.name: check_in_date

parameters.description: The hotel check-out date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format (e.g., '2026-05-25').
parameters.name: check_out_date

parameters.description: The token used to retrieve the next page of hotel results. This token is found in the 'next_page_token' field of a previous response.
parameters.name: next_page_token

parameters.description: The number of adults staying in the room.
parameters.name: adults

parameters.description: The number of children staying in the room.
parameters.name: children

parameters.description: The ages of the children, separated by commas (e.g., '5,10'). The number of ages must match the 'children' parameter.
parameters.name: children_ages

parameters.description: Set to true to return the raw HTML of the Google search results page alongside the structured data.
parameters.name: html

parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.
parameters.name: language

parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.
parameters.name: country

parameters.description: The three-letter ISO currency code for displaying prices (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR'). See Google Hotels Currency.
parameters.name: currency

parameters.description: The criteria to sort hotel results. Supported values: '3' (Lowest price), '8' (Highest rating), '13' (Most reviews).
parameters.name: sort_by

parameters.description: Minimum price filter for the hotel stay.
parameters.name: min_price

parameters.description: Maximum price filter for the hotel stay.
parameters.name: max_price

parameters.description: Filter by hotel property types. See the Google Property Types for the full list of supported hotel property types. For vacation rentals, refer to the Google Hotels Vacation Rentals Property Types.
parameters.name: property_types

parameters.description: Filter by specific amenities (e.g., '35' for free Wi-Fi). Google Hotels Amenities (hotel amenities). Google Hotels Vacation Rentals Amenities (vacation rental amenities)
parameters.name: amenities

parameters.description: Filter by minimum guest rating. Supported values: '7' (3.5+), '8' (4.0+), '9' (4.5+).
parameters.name: rating

parameters.description: Filter by specific hotel brand IDs. IDs can be comma-separated.
parameters.name: brands

parameters.description: Filter by hotel star ratings. Supported values: '2', '3', '4', '5'. Can be comma-separated.
parameters.name: hotel_class

parameters.description: Filter for hotels that offer free cancellation. Set to '1' or 'true' to enable.
parameters.name: free_cancellation

parameters.description: Filter for hotels currently offering special deals or discounts. Set to '1' or 'true' to enable.
parameters.name: special_offers

parameters.description: Filter for hotels that are eco-certified. Set to '1' or 'true' to enable.
parameters.name: eco_certified

parameters.description: Set to true to search for vacation rentals instead of standard hotels.
parameters.name: vacation_rentals

parameters.description: Minimum number of bedrooms required (applies to vacation rentals).
parameters.name: bedrooms

parameters.description: Minimum number of bathrooms required (applies to vacation rentals).
parameters.name: bathrooms

parameters.description: The unique token for a specific hotel property to fetch detailed information.
parameters.name: property_token

responses.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing
Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded
Internal server error or upstream service exception
